result.summary: Found 3 layout and content issues: text truncation in navigation and game titles that are cut off due to insufficient space or overflow handling.

issues.description: Navigation tab text 'Hot Gam' is truncated, should read 'Hot Games'
issues.suggestion: Ensure the navigation tabs have sufficient width to display full text, or implement text wrapping/responsive design adjustments

issues.description: Exclusive game titles are cut off/truncated on the right side of cards. Visible text shows 'MAGNI' and 'PHOI' instead of complete game names
issues.suggestion: Adjust card width, font size, or text truncation handling to display full game titles. Consider using text overflow management or increasing card dimensions

issues.description: Bottom row exclusive game cards show partial/truncated text ('MUNG', 'MM') indicating overflow issues with game title display
issues.suggestion: Review the grid layout and card dimensions to ensure all game titles are fully visible. Implement responsive sizing or text wrapping where appropriate
